creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

A slghtly modified version of the text has been committed 
to the web site.  I only changed some typos I noticed, so 
can you please review the online copy when it gets published 
after the next scheduled web-site build, to make sure I 
didn't botch anything. 

Thanks for your interest in FreeBSD, and I hope the online 
listing looks good already :-)
